text: A board has exclusive jurisdiction over piloting of vessels in this state between the Gulf of Mexico and the ports in the board’s jurisdiction.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 61. Compulsory Pilotage
##### § 61.006 — Board Jurisdiction

A board has exclusive jurisdiction over piloting of vessels in this state between the Gulf of Mexico and the ports in the board’s jurisdiction.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A board has exclusive jurisdiction over piloting of vessels in this state between the Gulf of Mexico and the ports in the board’s jurisdiction.
